## **Table of contents:**

## **Project overview:**

project

## **Logbook entries:** 

## **1-\*insert name of analysis here\*:** (eg. correlation between x and y)

### **Input files:** 

\*This analysis was generated using x and y datafiles that can be found
in \*insert location path either in P drive or elsewhere\*

### **Output files:** 

\*This analysis generated the following x and y datafiles/plots/etc that
can be found in \*insert location path either in P drive or elsewhere\*

### **Analysis description:** 

Describe what was done in the analysis, how the analysis was done. In
the same way as you describe a wet-lab experiment, describe your
computational analysis.

### **Highlights:** 

Using bulletpoints, describe the main take home messages of the results
of this analysis. Each bullet point should be a single sentence (Cancer
Cell journal style)
